rag_rules: Fix type mismatches in AGREE binary expressions by ensuring left and right sides match in type, e.g., int = int or bool = bool
Avoid introducing package-qualified identifiers in AGREE code that are not present in the AADL model or its dependencies
generic_rules: In AGREE contracts, ensure all expressions and declarations use only visible AADL features or locally declared helpers
When generating AGREE guarantees, relate visible outputs to visible inputs without relying on implementation-only paths
Use AGREE scalar types int, real, and bool consistently with AADL data types
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **}; blocks
Assignments in implementation scope must reference existing output features or declared auxiliary variables
anti_patterns: Do not write guarantee statements in implementation scope; use component type annexes for output dependency contracts
Do not introduce unresolved identifiers or invalid helper declarations that cause type errors
irrelevant_topics: component type and implementation structure extraction
